productDisplayName: Nike Men's Sweet Classic Black White Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic shoes from nike are for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Perforated leather uppers for superior breathability and protection Black lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliqued swoosh on the sides Embroidered logo on the back of collar Midsole EVA midsole for advanced cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole in herring bone pattern for superior traction and durability Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
